title: LEGO 71039 Minifigures Marvel Series 2, 1 of 12 Iconic Disney+ Show Characters to Collect in Each Mystery Bag, incl. Wolverine, Hawkeye, She-Hulk, Echo & More (1 Piece - Style Picked at Random)
features: LEGO Minifigures Marvel Series 2 features a mystery box with 1 of 12 iconic characters from some of Marvel Studio’s most beloved Disney+ shows
This eagerly anticipated sequel to the popular Series 1 Minifigures to collect lets kids and fans celebrate their favourite superheroes
12 characters: Agatha Harkness, Kate Bishop, Hawkeye, Moon Knight, Mr. Knight, She-Hulk, The Werewolf, Goliath, Storm, Beast, Wolverine and Echo
Each mystery bag contains 1 minifigure with at least 1 highly detailed accessory and a collector's leaflet, build your collection, display and play
These collectible LEGO Marvel minifigures blind boxes can be given to children and adults as an unexpected gift to expand their superhero collection
description: From the manufacturer An exciting surprise for Marvel fans Celebrate Marvel Studios with LEGO Minifigures boxes containing characters from some of their most popular films and shows. 12 Marvel characters to collect Kids can enjoy a fun build before recreating action with iconic characters from these LEGO Marvel Minifigures blind boxes. LEGO Minifigures Marvel Series 2 Marvel Heroes Unite! Goliath, She-Hulk and Echo. Recreate scenes from Hawkeye Kate Bishop and Hawkeye armed with bow and arrows. A Hero and his alter ego Moon Knight and Mr. Knight. X-Men ’97 adventures Storm and Beast ready for battle. Wolverine to the rescue The Marvel Hero is armed with his famous claws. The witch and the monster Agatha Harkness and The Werewolf. Who will you find in your mystery box? Each of the 12 Marvel characters comes in a sealed blind box with at least one accessory and a collector’s information leaflet.
